title: Astigmatism
description: Blur all textures, you have Astigmatism
body:
# Astigmatism

Astigmatism is a client-side mod that adds adjustable Gaussian blur effects to the texture atlases (like blocks, signs, particles, etc.), allowing you more control over your modpacks visual style. Inspired by [Myopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/myopia)

It also allows you to export a recreation of the final stitched texture atlases used by the game, so modpackers can inspect it. (1.18 only, this is native in 1.19.4+)
